ul.li: -▶▶ Error/Force Transition State Colors: 🟢 Active (SUBSCRIBED) 🔵 Transitioning ⚫ Inactive (UNSUBSCRIBED) 🔴 Error
SUBSCRIBING → UNSUBSCRIBING (must complete or timeout first)

div.p: SUBSCRIBE cmd Trigger: Client sends 0x03 command Guard: topic != "" Action:
SUBSCRIBE_ACK Trigger: Server responds 0x04 command Guard: None Action:
Timeout / Error Trigger: No ACK within timeout period Guard: None Action:
UNSUBSCRIBE cmd Trigger: Client sends 0x05 command Guard: Is subscribed Action:
UNSUBSCRIBE_ACK Trigger: Server responds 0x06 command Guard: None Action:
Connection Close Trigger: TCP FIN/RST or heartbeat timeout Guard: None Action:
Connection Close Trigger: TCP close during pending sub Guard: None Action:
Connection Close Trigger: TCP close during pending unsub Guard: None Action:
